moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Week
moments.blurb: The final stages of the 139th Wimbledon Championships are underway at the All England Club, with the Ladies' and Gentlemen's Singles Finals approaching this weekend.

angles.name: Centre Court Drama
angles.copy: It's finals week at Wimbledon! Who are you backing to lift the trophies on Centre Court this weekend? 🎾

angles.name: British Hopes
angles.copy: The grass courts are buzzing! Catch all the action from Wimbledon as the champions are decided. Any British hopefuls left to cheer for?

moments.title: Tour de France Continues
moments.blurb: The 113th edition of the Tour de France is currently in full swing, with riders battling through Stage 5 today, heading towards Pau.

angles.name: Cycling Endurance
angles.copy: The peloton pushes on! The Tour de France is delivering incredible drama in the mountains and sprints. Who's in the yellow jersey today?

angles.name: Stage 5 Action
angles.copy: Another day, another gruelling stage at the Tour de France. Catch up on all the highlights as the race continues its epic journey. 🚴

moments.title: The Open Championship Approaches
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship at Royal Birkdale begins its practice days on Sunday, July 12, with Championship play from July 16-19.

angles.name: Golf's Greatest
angles.copy: The countdown is on for The Open! Royal Birkdale is ready to host golf's oldest major from July 16th. Who are your picks for the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Birkdale Ready
angles.copy: Practice days start Sunday at Royal Birkdale for The 154th Open. Get ready for a week of world-class golf on the Merseyside links!

moments.title: Wireless Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: Wireless Festival brings urban music's biggest stars, including Ye (Kanye West) as a headliner, to Finsbury Park, London from July 10-12.

angles.name: Wireless Weekend
angles.copy: Wireless Festival is almost here! Finsbury Park is about to explode with the best in urban music, starting Friday. Who are you buzzing to see?

angles.name: Ye Headlines London
angles.copy: Ye is headlining Wireless Festival in London this weekend! Expect huge crowds and even bigger performances. Are you going?

moments.title: Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival
moments.blurb: Birmingham's Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival takes over Moseley Park from July 10-12, featuring a diverse lineup of groundbreaking UK and international artists.

angles.name: Birmingham Beats
angles.copy: Get ready for a soulful weekend! Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival kicks off in Birmingham this Friday. Who's on your must-see list?

angles.name: Park Party
angles.copy: Moseley Park is transforming for the Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival! Three days of amazing music and vibes start Friday. Don't miss it!

moments.title: Hebridean Celtic Festival
moments.blurb: The Hebridean Celtic Festival, celebrating music and culture, is set to take place in Stornoway, Outer Hebrides, Scotland from July 15-18.

angles.name: Island Sounds
angles.copy: Heading to the Outer Hebrides? The Hebridean Celtic Festival starts next week, bringing incredible music and atmosphere to Stornoway!

angles.name: Scottish Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Get ready for a unique festival experience! The Hebridean Celtic Festival is just days away. Who's excited for the music and culture?

moments.title: UK Heatwave Continues
moments.blurb: The UK is experiencing a prolonged heatwave, with temperatures in the mid-30s expected this week, particularly across southern and central England, and amber heat-health alerts in place.

angles.name: Stay Hydrated
angles.copy: Another scorcher today across the UK! Stay safe and hydrated in the heat, with temperatures remaining high for the rest of the week. ☀️

angles.name: Heatwave Tips
angles.copy: The heatwave is set to continue, with some areas seeing mid-30s. Remember to check on vulnerable people and keep cool!

moments.title: Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar S2
moments.blurb: The second season of 'Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar' premieres globally on Netflix this Sunday, July 12, catching up with the cast post-pods.

angles.name: Reality TV Catch-Up
angles.copy: Need your reality TV fix? Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar Season 2 drops on Netflix this Sunday! Who's ready for the drama?

angles.name: Post-Pod Problems
angles.copy: Find out what happened after the pods! Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar Season 2 is coming to Netflix this weekend. What do you predict?

moments.title: Little House on the Prairie New Adaptation
moments.blurb: A new adaptation of 'Little House on the Prairie', based on Laura Ingalls Wilder's classic books, arrives on Netflix on July 9.

angles.name: Classic Reimagined
angles.copy: A beloved classic gets a fresh take! The new 'Little House on the Prairie' adaptation streams on Netflix from tomorrow. Will you be watching?

angles.name: Family Drama
angles.copy: Transport yourself to the American West! The new 'Little House on the Prairie' series lands on Netflix tomorrow. Perfect for family viewing!

moments.title: The Cadburys Drama Announced
moments.blurb: BritBox has announced the cast for 'The Cadburys', a new period drama about the chocolate-making family, with production beginning in Birmingham.

angles.name: Sweet New Drama
angles.copy: A new period drama, 'The Cadburys', is coming! Production kicks off in Birmingham. Who's excited for this sweet story?

angles.name: Chocolate History
angles.copy: From Birmingham to your screens! BritBox is bringing the story of the Cadbury family to life in a new drama. What a treat!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Beck
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter and multi-instrumentalist Beck (Beck Hansen), known for his genre-bending music, turns 56 today.

angles.name: Beck's Day
angles.copy: Happy 56th Birthday to the one and only Beck! What's your favourite track from the genre-blending legend? #Beck

angles.name: Celebrating Beck
angles.copy: It's Beck's birthday! From 'Loser' to 'Dreams', his music has always pushed boundaries. Spin your favourite Beck tune today!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Courtney Love
moments.blurb: Courtney Love, lead singer of Hole and an iconic figure in alternative rock, turns 62 tomorrow.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the incredible Courtney Love celebrates her 62nd birthday! What's your favourite Hole anthem?

angles.name: Happy Birthday Tomorrow
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 62nd Birthday to the unforgettable Courtney Love tomorrow! Rock on!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Jack White
moments.blurb: Jack White, acclaimed musician, songwriter, and producer, best known as the frontman of The White Stripes, turns 51 tomorrow.

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Tomorrow is Jack White's 51st birthday! Celebrate the guitar hero's special day by blasting your favourite White Stripes or solo track. 🎸

angles.name: White Stripes Legend
angles.copy: Happy Birthday to the legendary Jack White tomorrow! Which of his many projects do you love the most?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Jim Kerr
moments.blurb: Jim Kerr, the distinctive lead singer of Scottish rock band Simple Minds, celebrates his 67th birthday tomorrow.

angles.name: Simple Minds Icon
angles.copy: Tomorrow, Jim Kerr of Simple Minds turns 67! From 'Don't You (Forget About Me)' to 'Alive and Kicking', what's your favourite Simple Minds hit?

angles.name: Scottish Legend
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to Scottish legend Jim Kerr tomorrow! Celebrate the Simple Minds frontman all day long.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Kenny Loggins
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer-songwriter Kenny Loggins, known for hits like 'Footloose' and 'Danger Zone', turns 78 on July 13th.

angles.name: Soundtrack King
angles.copy: Get ready to dance! Kenny Loggins turns 78 this Monday, July 13th. What's your go-to Loggins anthem?

angles.name: Celebrating Loggins
angles.copy: From 'Footloose' to 'Danger Zone', Kenny Loggins has given us so many iconic tracks. Happy 78th Birthday for Monday!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Missy Elliott
moments.blurb: Groundbreaking rapper, singer, songwriter, and producer Missy 'Misdemeanor' Elliott celebrates her 55th birthday on July 14th.

angles.name: Hip Hop Royalty
angles.copy: Get Ur Freak On! Missy Elliott turns 55 this Tuesday, July 14th. Drop your favourite Missy track to celebrate!

angles.name: Celebrating a Legend
angles.copy: Happy 55th Birthday for Tuesday to the incomparable Missy Elliott! Her influence on music is undeniable.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Linda Ronstadt
moments.blurb: Multi-Grammy-winning singer Linda Ronstadt, celebrated for her versatility across rock, country, and Latin music, turns 80 on July 15th.

angles.name: Music Legend
angles.copy: The iconic Linda Ronstadt celebrates her 80th birthday this Wednesday, July 15th! What's your favourite song from her incredible career?

angles.name: Happy 80th
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 80th Birthday for Wednesday to the legendary Linda Ronstadt! A true vocal powerhouse.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Stewart Copeland
moments.blurb: Stewart Copeland, the dynamic drummer and founder of The Police, turns 74 on July 16th.

angles.name: Drumming Legend
angles.copy: The incredible Stewart Copeland of The Police turns 74 this Thursday, July 16th! What's your favourite Police track?

angles.name: Happy Birthday Rocker
angles.copy: Wishing a fantastic 74th Birthday for Thursday to the one and only Stewart Copeland! The rhythm behind The Police.
